_doc: TS<->Python convention parity for the weight optimizer (Phase 28, OPT-02). The Python suite (test_optimizer_parity.py) and the TS suite (src/lib/scenario-optimizer-parity.test.ts) BOTH assert their own constants against this single fixture. If either codebase changes its annualization, sample floor, or per-strategy observation gate independently, the other side's parity test fails CI loudly — the conventions can never silently drift apart.
null_semantics: A degenerate / under-sampled / non-finite input yields weights=null (ok=false) in Python, which the frontend renders as an honest empty state — never a fabricated 0 weight.
